result.stdout:
Usage: DotNet.Jdt [options]

Options:
  -?|-h|--help              Show help information.
  -s|--source <SOURCE>      The base json file path
  -t|--tranform <TRANFORM>  The jdt transformation file path
  -o|--output <OUTPUT>      The output file path
